sentences.arabic: شُرْبُ الْمَاءِ بِكَمِّيَّةٍ كَافِيَةٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje dovoljne količine vode je neophodno za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking a sufficient amount of water is essential for the body.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ تَشْرَبَ ثَمَانِيَةَ أَكْوَابٍ مِنَ الْمَاءِ يَوْمِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Trebaš piti osam čaša vode dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: You should drink eight glasses of water daily.

sentences.arabic: الْمَاءُ يُسَاعِدُ فِي تَنْظِيفِ الْجِسْمِ مِنَ السُّمُومِ.
sentences.translation: Voda pomaže u čišćenju tijela od toksina.
sentences.translationEn: Water helps in cleansing the body of toxins.
